_meta.description: BMFFFL 2026 prospect database. Note: Players marked status=nfl_active were drafted in April 2025 NFL Draft and completed their first NFL season. They represent the 2025 BMFFFL rookie draft class — most are already on BMFFFL rosters. Players marked status=incoming are in the 2026 NFL Draft (April 24-26, 2026) and available in the June 5, 2026 BMFFFL rookie draft.

prospects.name: Shedeur Sanders
prospects.dynastyCeiling: QB1A in SF leagues with capable offense
prospects.description: Elite accuracy and pocket awareness. Limited mobility slightly hurts SF value vs. dual-threat QBs. Needs functional offensive line. High-profile player with narrative-based boom/bust swings.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL (Cleveland Browns, 5th-round pick) and already on BMFFFL roster. 2025 season: ~1,400 yards, 7 TDs, 10 INTs in 8 games as backup; never established starting role. Dynasty value is speculative — buy-low on ceiling.

prospects.name: Cam Ward
prospects.dynastyCeiling: Dual-threat QB1 contributing rushing stats in SF
prospects.dynastyCost: 1st round pick (1.02-1.08 depending on landing spot)
prospects.description: Higher boom-or-bust profile than Sanders — more arm talent questions, more rushing floor. Age 24 at draft time is slightly older for dynasty QB investment.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL (Tennessee Titans, #1 overall pick 2025). Already on BMFFFL roster (eldridsm). 2025 stats: 3,169 pass yards, 15 TD, 7 INT, 59.8% completion, 159 rush yards — tough rookie year with HC fired Week 6, led NFL in sacks taken (48). Year 2 with offensive continuity has upside.

prospects.name: Dillon Gabriel
prospects.dynastyCeiling: Backup dynasty option in SF formats
prospects.description: Older prospect (25) hurts long-term value. Elite college production may not translate to NFL due to size/athleticism limitations.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL. Limited dynasty value due to age.

prospects.name: Jaxson Dart
prospects.description: Physically imposing with good arm talent. Less consistent in college, developing accuracy. Better long-term dynasty upside than Gabriel due to age (22) and physical tools.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL. Already on BMFFFL roster.

prospects.name: Ashton Jeanty
prospects.description: Most hyped RB prospect in years. Exceptional vision, contact balance, pass-catching. The 'everything RB' profile. 2025 NFL season: 975 rushing yards, 9 total TDs, 3.7 YPC — Raiders' weak OL suppressed efficiency vs. college expectations but TD production confirmed.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL (Las Vegas Raiders). Already on BMFFFL roster. 2025 season was below raw-stat projections but TD volume was real. HOLD — Year 2 breakout candidate with better OL or different team.

prospects.name: Omarion Hampton
prospects.description: Physical profile: size + production + pass-catching ability. Less explosive than Jeanty but durable three-down profile. 2025 NFL season: 545 rushing yards, 4 TDs, 32 receptions in 9 games before hamstring IR — showed the profile but missed significant time.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL (LA Chargers). Already on BMFFFL roster. 2025 season cut short by hamstring injury (9 games). HOLD — health profile is the question; per-game stats were solid.

prospects.name: Kalel Mullings
prospects.description: Older than ideal at 23 at draft time. Physical profile is excellent but age discount applies.
prospects.notes: In NFL. Limited dynasty value due to age.

prospects.name: Tetairoa McMillan
prospects.description: Consensus WR1 of the 2025 class. Massive frame, elite catch radius, dominant in contested-catch. 2025 NFL season: 70 receptions, 1,014 yards, 7 TDs — won Offensive Rookie of the Year. When Panthers' QB stabilizes, becomes true WR1.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL (Carolina Panthers). Already on BMFFFL roster. 2025 OROY confirmed — BUY if available. Fell just short of 85/1100 thresholds but the production and award validate the profile.

prospects.name: Luther Burden III
prospects.description: Slot receiver / after-the-catch threat. Elite athleticism and route running. Smaller frame fits modern offense perfectly.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL. Already on BMFFFL roster.

prospects.name: Emeka Egbuka
prospects.dynastyCeiling: WR2/3 with WR1 upside in right system
prospects.description: Polished route runner. High floor due to technical skill; ceiling depends on landing spot.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL. Already on BMFFFL roster.

prospects.name: Matthew Golden
prospects.description: Explosive production, 15.0+ YPC. Deep threat / explosive play generator. Green Bay Packers — excellent WR development history.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL (Green Bay Packers). Already on BMFFFL roster.

prospects.name: Elic Ayomanor
prospects.description: Physical, contested-catch receiver. Tennessee landing spot with limited QB support. 2025 NFL season: 41 receptions, 515 yards, 4 TDs — limited role as 4th-round pick in crowded offense.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL (Tennessee Titans). Already on BMFFFL roster. 2025 was below projections — rotational piece, not featured. HOLD-LOW — Year 2 volume increase needed to validate.

prospects.name: Colston Loveland
prospects.description: Consensus TE1 of the 2025 class. Chicago Bears. 2025 NFL season: 58 receptions, 713 yards, 6 TDs — strong rookie debut building chemistry with Caleb Williams. Year 2 upside is significant.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL (Chicago Bears). Already on BMFFFL roster. 2025 breakout confirmed — MUST OWN. Pay the premium.

prospects.name: Mason Taylor
prospects.description: Son of Jason Taylor. Athletic TE with receiving ability. New York Jets.
prospects.notes: Already in NFL. Already on BMFFFL roster.

prospects.name: Harold Fannin Jr.
prospects.description: Undrafted free agent who earned a starting role with Cleveland Browns. Exceptional value for acquisition cost.
prospects.notes: UDFA signed by Cleveland Browns. Already on BMFFFL roster as JuicyBussy's starting TE.
